title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi, a 25-year-old founded insurance startup, rebuilt a trillion-dollar industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy systems, raising $108M Series A and achieving rapid B2B growth. The founders' principle of pursuing the most ambitious version of an idea and their willingness to shut down a working business to pursue deeper moats are highlighted as key to their competitive advantage.
